conversion_notes: File placed directly into library. IFC2X3 schema; PredefinedType NOTDEFINED in file (corrected to TOILETPAN in product.json). No IfcClassificationReference entities present in file. Product name decoded: EDIT ASSIST = family, BTW = back-to-wall, BWL = bowl/washdown, HO = horizontal outlet, WHITE = colour, RSD = rimless.
